ddls:
CREATE TABLE "boost_stats" (
  "match_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the match (foreign key) */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the team (foreign key) */,
  "boost_bpm" INTEGER /* Boost per minute during the match */,
  "boost_bcpm" INTEGER /* Boost collected per minute during the match */,
  "boost_avg_amount" REAL /* Average amount of boost available */,
  "boost_amount_collected" INTEGER /* Total amount of boost collected */,
  "boost_amount_stolen" INTEGER /* Total amount of boost stolen from opponents */,
  "boost_count_collected_big" INTEGER /* Count of large boost pickups */,
  "boost_count_stolen_big" INTEGER /* Count of large boost stolen from opponents */,
  "boost_count_collected_small" INTEGER /* Count of small boost pickups */,
  "boost_count_stolen_small" INTEGER /* Count of small boost stolen from opponents */,
  "boost_time_zero_boost" INTEGER /* Time spent with zero boost */,
  "boost_time_full_boost" INTEGER /* Time spent with full boost */,
  "boost_time_boost_0_25" INTEGER /* Time spent with boost between 0-25% */,
  "boost_time_boost_25_50" INTEGER /* Time spent with boost between 25-50% */,
  "boost_time_boost_50_75" INTEGER /* Time spent with boost between 50-75% */,
  "boost_time_boost_75_100" INTEGER /* Time spent with boost between 75-100% */,
  "boost_pickup_time_avg" REAL /* Average time taken to pick up a boost */,
  "boost_pickup_time_stddev" REAL /* Standard deviation of boost pickup time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the player */,
  "match_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the match (foreign key) */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the team (foreign key) */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., striker, goalkeeper) */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves made by the player */,
  "shots_taken" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the player */,
  "boost_collected" INTEGER /* Total amount of boost collected by the player */,
  "boost_used" INTEGER /* Total amount of boost used by the player */,
  "time_played" INTEGER /* Time played by the player in seconds */,
  "demo_inflicted" INTEGER /* Number of demos inflicted by the player */,
  "demo_taken" INTEGER /* Number of demos taken by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positioning" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the player */,
  "match_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the match (foreign key) */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the team (foreign key) */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "x_position" REAL /* X-coordinate of the player's position */,
  "y_position" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the player's position */,
  "z_position" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the player's position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "match_id", "match_time"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positioning_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demo_stats" (
  "match_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the match (foreign key) */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the team (foreign key) */,
  "demo_inflicted" INTEGER /* Number of demos inflicted by the team */,
  "demo_taken" INTEGER /* Number of demos taken by the team */,
  "demo_ratio" REAL /* Demo ratio (demos inflicted / demos taken) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_outcomes" (
  "match_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the match (foreign key) */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the team (foreign key) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (win, loss, tie) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the team */,
  "team_slug" TEXT /* Slug for the team's URL */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "team_region" TEXT /* Region of the team */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "tournament_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "tournament_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)
